reason: Project layout — where to place new scenes/scripts under entities/
Scene composition patterns — TileMapLayer setup, node structure, dependency injection
Signal conventions, lifecycle order (_init/_ready), input handling via _unhandled_input
GDScript coding standards — typed variables, naming, @onready, preload patterns
State patterns — node-local state, debuff state management

summary: Refactored paint_layer.gd to consume the tscn-configured TileSet via set_cells_terrain_connect (auto-tile peering bits). Aligned PaintType enum with tscn terrain ids: ICE=0, LAVA=1, STORM=2, VINE=3. Removed PAINT_TEXTURES, _atlas_to_type, _setup_tileset, _get_source_id_for_type. Added paint_cells batch API. erase_at uses set_cells_terrain_connect with terrain=-1 to recompute neighbour peering. Updated paint_manager.gd: paint_at/paint_fan/paint_area/paint_path now collect cells then dispatch one paint_cells call (fan+path dedupe via Dictionary). External signatures unchanged so player.gd/main.gd callers unaffected.

Wired action animations + fixed-duration dodge in player.gd. (#2) attack/throw/dodge branches in _unhandled_input now call animation.play(...). (#3) _physics_process gates idle/run switching: while animation.animation in ACTION_ANIMS and is_playing(), don't override the action animation. (#5) Dodge is now a fixed 0.25s impulse: pressing dodge sets is_dodging, dodge_start, dodge_timer=DODGE_DURATION, dodge_velocity=dir*BASE_SPEED*2; while is_dodging, _physics_process sets velocity=dodge_velocity instead of lerp toward input; on timer expiry, calls paint_mgr.paint_path(dodge_start, global_position, ...). Removed the is_action_released('dodge') handler. player.tscn already had loop=false on attack/throw/dodge (#4 already satisfied), no scene changes needed.

Fixed PaintLayer paint not appearing on attack/throw/dodge. Two root causes: (A) PaintLayer rendered under GroundLayer because it sits earlier in the Main scene tree as a sibling at default z_index 0. Added z_index=1 override on the PaintLayer instance node in main.tscn (no node-order changes, no edit to paint_layer.tscn so other consumers are unaffected). (B) PaintManager._find_paint_layer relied on call_deferred + current_scene + has_method('paint_at') heuristic — fragile timing and class match. Replaced auto-discovery with explicit dependency injection: main.gd:_ready now sets PaintManager.paint_layer = $PaintLayer before player init; paint_manager.gd dropped _ready/_find_paint_layer/_find_node_of_type entirely (kept var paint_layer + null guards in every paint_* / get_paint_at). Added a defensive paint_layer null check + push_warning at the top of player.gd:_unhandled_input (after the early mouse comment block, before action branches) so any future regression yells in console rather than failing silently.
